projectInfo.title: About the Project
projectInfo.description1: This is a lightweight REST client app, inspired by Postman and Thunder Client. You can make API requests, view responses, manage variables, and track history.
projectInfo.description2: Built with React 18+, TypeScript, Next.js, and modern UI practices.

memberAlice.name: 27moon
